meta.description: Naming conventions, file structure rules, and code style for the MSM Portal.

styledComponentRules: Always use SC prefix for styled components defined within a file
Use $ prefix on props that should NOT be forwarded to the DOM (transient props)
Never hardcode color, spacing, or typography values — always use theme tokens
Co-locate styled components in a styledComponents.tsx file if there are more than 3
Do not export styled components unless shared across multiple components
Shared styled components go in src/common/component/styled/
formComponentRules: Always require the name prop — it's the Formik field name
Show errors only after meta.touched is true
required={false} shows (Optional) suffix — required={true} shows no suffix
Use readonly prop for view-only states instead of disabling

directoryStructure.componentPattern: Each component lives in: src/common/component/{component-name}/{ComponentName}.tsx + styledComponents.tsx + types.ts + const.ts + index.ts

layers.name: Page
layers.responsibility: Thin wrapper. Only imports and renders the Container. No hooks, no logic.

layers.name: Container
layers.responsibility: All hooks (data fetching, navigation, i18n, alerts). Computes props for Component.

layers.name: Component
layers.responsibility: Pure UI. Receives all data via props. No data fetching. No navigation.

envVars.note: Each client has separate env files per environment

constraints.rule: Never use hex color values directly in styled-components or JSX. Always use theme palette tokens.
Never use raw px values for spacing properties (padding, margin, gap, width, height when used as spacing). Always use theme.mcui.spacing(n) where n is a multiplier of the 8px base unit.
Never use raw font-size, font-weight, or line-height values. Always use theme typography tokens.
Never use the style={{}} prop on JSX elements. Use styled-components instead.
constraints.example_correct: <SCWrapper> (defined as a styled.div with theme tokens)

constraints.rule: MCForm* components must always be rendered inside a <Formik> context. Never render form input components outside a Formik tree.
Non-HTML props passed to styled-components must use the $ prefix (transient props) to prevent them from being forwarded to the DOM.
constraints.correct_pattern: $propName in both styled component definition and JSX usage
constraints.example_violation: const SCBox = styled.div<{ isActive: boolean }>`color: ${p => p.isActive ? 'red' : 'blue'}`; <SCBox isActive={true}>

constraints.rule: All user-facing strings must be translated using the useTranslation() hook. Never hardcode display text as string literals in JSX.
All styled-components defined within a file must be prefixed with SC. They must not be exported unless shared across multiple components.
Never use MCSingleTextInput directly inside forms. Use MCFormTextInput instead, which provides Formik integration, label, error display, and accessibility.
constraints.example_violation: <MCSingleTextInput value={val} onChange={...} /> (used directly in a form)

constraints.rule: Imports must follow the prescribed order: (1) React and react-related, (2) third-party libraries, (3) Moloco UI library, (4) internal portal imports (@msm-portal/*), (5) relative imports.
Component-layer files (pure UI) must not perform data fetching, call tRPC/API hooks, or contain navigation logic. All data must arrive via props from the Container layer.
constraints.correct_pattern: Component receives all data as typed props from its Container

constraints.rule: Page-layer files must be thin wrappers that only import and render a Container component. They must contain no hooks, state, business logic, or data fetching.
constraints.correct_pattern: Page file renders exactly one Container with no additional logic
